speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] G'day Brisbane, it's Wednesday the 15th of April, and welcome to ParkSyde Bright Side! I'm Alex Mercer and bloody hell, what a day to be celebrating the good news from around our beautiful planet.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Jamie, absolutely buzzing to share some incredible stories with you this morning! From peace talks in the Middle East to amazing discoveries right here in Australia - we've got the uplifting news that'll put a smile on your dial.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Too right, Jamie! While the mainstream media focuses on the doom and gloom, we're here to remind you that brilliant things are happening every single day. So grab your morning coffee and let's dive into some proper good vibes!
